nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Pasonanca Natural Park
nodes.summary: Pasonanca Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo、Chocolate boobook等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mount Kitanglad
nodes.summary: Mount Kitanglad是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Everett's scops owl、Philippine serpent eagle等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Naked-faced spiderhunter
nodes.summary: Naked-faced spiderhunter（Naked-faced spiderhunter，学名 Arachnothera clarae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Pasonanca Natural Park, Bataan National Park, Mount Banahaw, Mount Kitanglad

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Pasonanca Natural Park, Bataan National Park, Mount Banahaw, Mount Kitanglad

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The naked-faced spiderhunter is found in forests and shrublands in low-lying areas and lower mountains

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, deforestation in the Philippines continues throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
